ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province/state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country/region */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported on that date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported on that date */,
  "recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries reported on that date */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the case belongs to */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., confirmed, death, recovery) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the patient */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Whether the patient was hospitalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_contact_tracing" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being traced */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being traced */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the case and contact */,
  "exposure_date" TEXT /* Date of exposure */,
  "exposure_location" TEXT /* Location of exposure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the hospital is located */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the hospital */,
  "beds_available" INTEGER /* Number of beds available */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of medical staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the patient is being treated */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the patient belongs to */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of treatment (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
